description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are finished in a light-colored brick or masonry, and the house features multiple windows with white framing, providing ample natural light to the interior. A prominent feature is the large tiled patio at the front, partially covered by a decorative white pergola supported by ornate columns. The interior layout is visible, showing several rooms including what appears to be a kitchen, bathroom, and bedrooms, separated by interior walls and doors. The house has a simple, functional design with a focus on open outdoor space and straightforward access to the main entryway. The overall style is modest and practical, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story house with light brick walls, multiple windows, and a large tiled patio with a decorative pergola at the front. The design is simple and functional, with visible interior rooms and a flat roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tiled patio, white pergola, main entry door, and several windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the pergola extending from the patio, and the arrangement of interior rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, a secondary door, and the back portion of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio and pergola from a different angle, as well as the side wall and window placements.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, tiled patio, and a decorative white pergola supported by columns.
